someone in the Merchant Guild is doctoring their ledgers.
a shipment of arms was diverted from the docks last night.
the city watch is being paid to look the other way in the Warrens.
a noble heir is seeking quiet passage out of the city.
a new creditor appeared in the Gilded Heights — no one knows their name.
the Foundry League is stockpiling materials beyond any usual order.
two Wren contacts went dark the same night. Coincidence is unlikely.
someone is buying up debt certificates at full face value — panic buying, or something worse.
